nasb.text: Then Samson said, “With the jawbone of a donkey, Heaps upon heaps, With the jawbone of a donkey I have killed a thousand men.”

esv.text: And Samson said, “With the jawbone of a donkey, heaps upon heaps, with the jawbone of a donkey have I struck down a thousand men.”

cnv.text: 參孫說： “我用驢腮骨殺人成堆； 我用驢腮骨擊殺了一千人。”

ccb.text: 参孙说： “用这驴腮骨，我杀人成堆； 用这驴腮骨，我杀戮千人。”
